focus: test integrity & verification honesty: launcher-lease socketPath timing, quality-loop auto-fix default coverage, relation-backfill contradiction-cycle gap, fanout-run exit accounting, pipeline-enforcement fixture realism
noveltyJustification: All 3 findings are new this iteration (no prior A6 coverage; iters 1-2 were inventory + A1). Weighted new = P1(5)+P2(1)+P2(1)=7; weightedTotal=7; ratio=1.0. No refinements of prior findings.

findingDetails.title: Auto-fix DEFAULT-ON path untested; tests force mode:full-auto or SPECKIT_QUALITY_AUTO_FIX=false, never the production default (advisory + env-unset=true)
findingDetails.evidence: Production: autoFixEnabled = mode==='full-auto' || isQualityAutoFixEnabled() (handlers/quality-loop.ts:591); isQualityAutoFixEnabled default TRUE (lib/search/search-flags.ts:168). mode defaults 'advisory' (quality-loop.ts:590). Every auto-fix test forces mode:'full-auto'; every advisory test sets env='false'. The real branch (advisory + env default true) has zero coverage; bare-default calls use passing content so auto-fix never engages.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a test with mode unset/advisory AND SPECKIT_QUALITY_AUTO_FIX unset on below-threshold-but-fixable content; assert auto-fix engages and improves score, matching production default behavior.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Both test files in diff range; OR-branch is literal production path quality-loop.ts:591; gap shown by exhaustive read of every runQualityLoop call site.
findingDetails.claim: Production-default auto-fix path (advisory mode + env-unset=true) never exercised; auto-fix tests force full-auto, advisory tests force env false.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Grepped both files for runQualityLoop with neither mode:full-auto nor env set; bare-default calls (quality-loop:451,570; pipeline:984,1130) use HIGH-quality content that passes attempt 1 so auto-fix never engages.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: If isQualityAutoFixEnabled were default-FALSE the gap would be benign; REFUTED by search-flags.ts:168 (default TRUE).
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if a search-flags/rollout-policy suite asserts the default-true env drives auto-fix through runQualityLoop end-to-end.

findingDetails.title: relation-backfill-conflict tests only 2-node reciprocal conflict; A3 charter's 3-node transitive contradiction cycle uncovered in this file
findingDetails.evidence: seedReciprocalLineage seeds one directed pair 20->21 (lineage 'caused' vs supersession 'contradicts'); all 5 cases reuse it. No fixture builds a 3-node transitive cycle (A->B->C with A->C contradicts) named in strategy A3 (relation-backfill.ts ~670-709, contradiction-detection.ts).
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a 3-node transitive-contradiction fixture or confirm the inference rules cannot produce one; cross-check relation-backfill-unit/similarity suites.
findingDetails.scopeProof: File in diff range; gap shown by reading all 5 it() blocks and the only seed helper.
findingDetails.claim: Conflict guard proven only for 2-node reciprocal; 3-node transitive cycle untested in this file.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: All 5 cases reuse the 2-node fixture; did not read sibling backfill suites (out of named target set) where a 3-node test may exist.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: Inference rules may only ever emit single-pair edges, making 3-node transitive contradiction non-applicable rather than a gap.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Drop if sibling suites cover the 3-node cycle or the rules provably cannot produce a transitive contradiction.

findingDetails.title: pipeline-enforcement fixtures realistic but write into repo tree (ALLOWED_BASE_PATHS) and ~7 conditional-guarded assertions no-op when precondition false
findingDetails.evidence: mkdtemp root forced under process.cwd() because ALLOWED_BASE_PATHS rejects os.tmpdir() (comment lines 36-46); if(result.passed)/if(!warnOnly)/if(rejectionCode) guards make some assertions no-ops. Counterweight: Cat 6 gate-ordering proofs (1079-1117) assert real status/codes, so suite is not a rubber-stamp.
findingDetails.recommendation: Informational; accept documented ALLOWED_BASE_PATHS constraint and OR-logic guards, or set MEMORY_BASE_PATH to move fixtures out of the working tree.
findingDetails.scopeProof: File in diff range; both caveats quoted from the file.
findingDetails.claim: Fixtures realistic and assert real pipeline status, but write into repo tree and several assertions are conditional-guarded.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Read golden-path + all 8 categories; gate-ordering and parser tests assert concrete statuses/codes, not just non-throwing.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: if-guards are correct defensive testing of nondeterministic OR-logic boundaries; repo-relative fixtures are documented accepted constraint.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Informational; no action if maintainers accept the documented constraint.

traceabilityChecks: fanout memory concern refuted at HEAD
parallel-dispatch iteration number 7 governs (no shared state.jsonl mutation)
edgeCases: 3-node cycle may live in sibling suite (P2 with downgradeTrigger)
conditional-guarded assertions guard genuine OR-logic boundaries not inflated to P1
ruledOut: launcher-lease socketPath bridge false-pass (listen-timing race): test waits for STUB_DAEMON_LISTENING from inside listen callback + socket existence before spawning secondary (launcher-lease.vitest.ts:69,477-478,485)

fan-out non-zero-exit/timeout counted as success: fanout-run.cjs:464,471-480 throws on timedOut||exitCode!==0; fanout-pool.cjs:209-210 counts only fulfilled; fanout-run.vitest.ts:233-312 asserts exit 3/2 + counts

integrationEvidence.why: production mode/auto-fix resolution that F-A6-01 depends on
default-TRUE auto-fix flag confirming the untested branch is the real default
fulfilled-vs-rejected settlement -> summary counts -> exit code, validating fanout failure-accounting ruled-out claim
